title: Peculiar Primordials
description: An addon for Unusual Prehistory, adding various new prehistoric creatures!
body:
Introducing Peculiar Primordials, an addon for Unusual Prehistory, a mod by p33ko32213 that adds various revivable dinosaurs and prehistoric creatures!
This mod adds four new prehistoric creatures that you can revive, with many more planned for the future.

 

Added Mobs:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


Neilpeartia  
Blochius  
Tapejara  
Giganhinga

Foreyia
</details>


 

For more info on these mobs, refer to the encyclopedia of prehistory in-game.

 

 

 

Requires Unusual Prehistory and Geckolib to function
